privacy: Public compact artifact; raw local model paths, hostnames, and operator-only staging details are redacted.
backend: local release backend on loopback after streaming-responsiveness patch
load_elapsed_ms: not retained exactly in compact artifact; load completed successfully before stream probe
notes: The stream was intentionally aborted after the first role-only SSE chunk to avoid waiting for another long first token.
The isolated backend was killed after the probe so no local generation was left running.
This verifies perceived-streaming plumbing and server responsiveness; it does not improve the measured 253.5s first-content latency.
